allow: Bash(python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb=openpyxl.load_workbook\('车机软件汇总.xlsx'\); ws=wb.active; print\('Columns:', [c.value for c in ws[1]]\); print\('Row2\(header\):', [c.value for c in ws[2]]\); print\('Total rows:', ws.max_row\)")

Bash(python -c "import openpyxl; wb=openpyxl.load_workbook\('车机软件汇总.xlsx'\); ws=wb.active; print\('Columns:', [c.value for c in ws[1]]\); print\('Row2\(header\):', [c.value for c in ws[2]]\); print\('Total rows:', ws.max_row\)")

Bash(node -e "const XLSX=require\('xlsx'\); const wb=XLSX.readFile\('车机软件汇总.xlsx'\); const ws=wb.Sheets['Sheet1']; const data=XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json\(ws,{header:1,defval:'',range:1}\); console.log\('表头:', JSON.stringify\(data[0]\)\); console.log\('数据行数:', data.length-1\); data.slice\(1\).forEach\(\(r,i\)=>console.log\(i+1, r[0], r[1], r[2]?.substring\(0,60\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const o=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('output.json','utf8'\)\);const r=o.results.find\(r=>r.name.includes\('乐酷桌面公签版'\)\);console.log\('乐酷公签:',r.url.split\('/'\).pop\(\),r.method\);const b=o.results.find\(r=>r.name.includes\('哔哩'\)\);console.log\('哔哩:',b.url.split\('/'\).pop\(\),b.method\);")

Bash(node -e "const o=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('output.json','utf8'\)\);const r=o.results.find\(r=>r.name.includes\('乐酷桌面公签版'\)\);console.log\('output:', r.url.split\('/'\).pop\(\), 'method:', r.method\);")

Bash(node -e "const o=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('output.json','utf8'\)\);console.log\('generatedAt:',o.generatedAt\);const r=o.results.find\(r=>r.name.includes\('乐酷桌面公签版'\)\);console.log\('公签版:',r.url.split\('/'\).pop\(\)\);")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const m=d.match\(/href=\\"\(https?:\\/\\/[^\\"]+\)\\"/g\); m && m.forEach\(h=>console.log\(h.replace\('href=\\"',''\).replace\('\\"',''\)\)\); }\);")
